body:
## Plan Gate — 4d-triggers COMPLETE ✅

**Status:** Research → Plan & Design done. **HARD STOP** before implementation. PLAN-EVAL routed to separate session per harness v2.

### MEASURE-FIRST summary (re-baselined against `8264a1c`)

| Unit | doc-lint (ground truth) | ptr | jsdoc | dry-run | check all EPs | tests | docs/ |
|------|------------------------|-----|-------|---------|--------------|-------|-------|
| `@netscript/plugin-triggers-core` | **211** | 46 | 165 | PASS (0 slow) | PASS | 3 | **MISSING** |
| `@netscript/plugin-triggers` | **138** | 76 | 62 | PASS (0 slow) | PASS | **0** | **MISSING** |

- **Barrel vs combined reconciliation:** per-EP sum overcounts ptr (core 279 vs 46; plugin 97 vs 76); barrel `mod.ts` undercounts total (core 78 vs 211; plugin 9 vs 138). **Ground truth = combined run** over all entrypoints.
- **`behavior.triggers-health` E2E PASS** (16ms) on base — port 8093 confirmed. OQ-D resolved.
- **`verify-plugin.ts` MISSING** — only A5 plugin without one.
- **Core F-6 gaps:** no `test` or `publish:dry-run` tasks; `check` only covers `mod.ts`.
- **F-1 violation:** `test-webhooks-e2e.ts` 423 LOC.

### Plan decisions (locked)

- **Core archetype:** A3 (Runtime/Behavior) — trigger firing/scheduling/dedup/DLQ invariants → F-13 required.
- **Plugin archetype:** A5 (Plugin Package) — confirmed.
- **Combined vs split:** **COMBINED** (23 slices <30 cap). 4d is the last sub-wave; splitting adds orchestration overhead for marginal benefit.
- **Public surface:** 21 entrypoints all retained (zero external consumers, alpha latitude).
- **LD-8 ptr-fix:** split by origin — first-party re-export, third-party structural/`@ignore`, internal export, incidental `@ignore`.
- **F-1 split:** `test-webhooks-e2e.ts` → 4 Deno test files under `tests/e2e/`.
- **A5 test layer:** `verify-plugin.ts` + 4 tests (manifest, CLI, Aspire, E2E gates).
- **docs/ trees:** both units get architecture + usage docs (unique 4d workload).

### Artifacts

- `research.md` — full per-EP + combined + barrel breakdown, consumer scan, health probe evidence.
- `plan.md` — 23 locked slices with gates + files, risk register, deferred scope, gate-matrix cross-ref.
- `drift.md` — re-baseline findings appended.
- `worklog.md` — phase log updated.

**Next:** PLAN-EVAL (separate session, Option A).
@openhands-agent model=openrouter/qwen/qwen3.7-max output=pr-comment use harness proceed to PLAN-EVAL for this PR.

<!-- openhands-agent-summary -->
## OpenHands Agent — Running

Model: `openrouter/qwen/qwen3.7-max`
Provider: `OPENROUTER`
Output mode: `pr-comment`

Run: https://github.com/rickylabs/netscript/actions/runs/27238904000
